title: Press
subtitle: Awards and media mentions for Grand Pavilion.

items.headline: Best Cantonese Experience in Queens
items.excerpt: Grand Pavilion blends classic banquet tradition with refined service and outstanding dim sum execution.

items.headline: Top Festival Menu Program
items.excerpt: Recognized for thoughtful Lunar New Year and Mid-Autumn seasonal menu design.

items.headline: Where to Book a Cantonese Banquet in Flushing
items.excerpt: The piece highlights our private dining flexibility and chef-led tasting options.

items.headline: A Refined Dim Sum Service That Still Feels Traditional
items.excerpt: Praised for consistency, tea pairing, and deep weekend dim sum selection.

items.headline: Chef Li Wei on Heritage, Technique, and Seasonal Menus
items.excerpt: An interview covering sourcing, stock traditions, and banquet menu planning.
